---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for any project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-sentence description of the feature.

## Project / Component

Which project would benefit? (e.g., `Scripts.OptimizeBrowsers / cli`)

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Include example usage, command-line flags, or UI mockups if applicable.

```bash
# Example
project-name --new-flag value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Links, related projects, mockups, etc.
